revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:8月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月初七]][[zh:八月初七]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 7|qq=August 7}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1720|en|1720|qid=Q6908|lt=1720|1=1720}} {{ill|September 9|en|September 9|qid=Q2856|lt=September 9|1=September 9}}) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} reorganized the Edo {{ill|Machihikeshi|ja|町火消し|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Machihikeshi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 火消|1=Hikeshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11566931}} into the "Iroha 47-gumi". == Births == * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|qid=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1665|en|1665|qid=Q7582|lt=1665|1=1665}} {{ill|September 15|en|September 15|qid=Q2846|lt=September 15|1=September 15}}) – {{ill|Nichikan|ja|日寛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nichikan|1=Nichikan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6581456}}, a monk (died {{ill|1726|en|1726|qid=Q6936|lt=1726|1=1726}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Yūryaku|en|Emperor Yūryaku|qid=Q357235|lt=Emperor Yūryaku|1=Emperor Yūryaku}} 24th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|479|en|479|qid=Q30989|lt=479|1=479}} {{ill|September 8|en|September 8|qid=Q2850|lt=September 8|1=September 8}}) – {{ill|Emperor Yūryaku|en|Emperor Yūryaku|qid=Q357235|lt=Emperor Yūryaku|1=Emperor Yūryaku}}, the 21st {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}}. * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|qid=Q10889567|lt=Genna|1=Yuanhe}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1620|en|1620|qid=Q6810|lt=1620|1=1620}} {{ill|September 3|en|September 3|qid=Q2860|lt=September 3|1=September 3}}) – {{ill|Tanaka Tadamasa|ja|田中忠政|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanaka Tadamasa|1=Tanaka Tadamasa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11575548}}, the 2nd head of the {{ill|Yanagawa Domain|en|Yanagawa Domain|qid=Q3034574|lt=Yanagawa Domain|1=Yanagawa Domain}} (born {{ill|1585|en|1585|qid=Q6736|lt=1585|1=1585}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1831|en|1831|qid=Q7579|lt=1831|1=1831}} {{ill|September 12|en|September 12|qid=Q2849|lt=September 12|1=September 12}}) – {{ill|Jippensha Ikku|en|Jippensha Ikku|qid=Q260290|lt=Juppensha Ikku|1=Jippensha Ikku}}, a playwright (born {{ill|1765|en|1765|qid=Q7665|lt=1765|1=1765}}). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|6|8|8|7|7|9|8|0807|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
